prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约1387名→1477名→11095名→2743名，波动剧烈。2024年出现异常大幅后移（11095名），2025年大幅回稳至2743名，但仍 高于2022–2023年水平，近两年基准位次约2743名；本省理科/物理类计划2022年13人、2023年13人、2024年13人、2025年15人，2025年扩招2人；2026年 计划15人，与2025年持平，无新增名额。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定在50–56名区间，属全国顶尖政法类院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面（早年校园安全事件），但影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第6（高热），法学类短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续偏高；2024年曾出现 内蒙古理科法学类投档线暴跌信号（省排6k7–1w2即可录取），对物理类考生报考心理可能有滞后影响；法学为A+学科（全国唯一法学A+高校），学科实力顶尖；物理类招生专业中含法学（金融双学士学位项目），交叉学科吸引力强；其他专业（国际商务、工商管理、社会工作、新闻学）无A-及以上学科评估数据。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中国政法大学位于北京，非本省高校；该 校在宁夏招生占比极小（2025年约2.0%），属跨省招生，地域偏好对报考影响中性；法学专业热度2021–2023年持续偏热（推荐），2024年转为分化观望，整体仍属热门方向；金融/财经/经济类2024年分化观望，工商管理类明显劝退；本省2026年考生总数约6 6000人（不确定），按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算约44500人，较2025年略增。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2743名、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生略增、 抖音高热维持报考热度、2024年理科投档异常可能有滞后影响等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年略后移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约2763名，区间2266–3260名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings were approximately 1387 → 1477 → 11095 → 2743, with drastic fluctuations. In 2024, there was an abnormal large backward shift (11095), and in 2025, it significantly stabilized to 2743, but still higher than the 2022–2023 levels, with a recent two-year baseline ranking of about 2743; the province's science/physics category enrollment plan was 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 15 in 2025, with an expansion of 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 15, unchanged from 2025, with no new slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 50–56 range, belonging to the top national political science and law institutions; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (early campus safety incidents), but impact is limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 6th (high heat), with high exposure of law-related short videos, maintaining consistently high application attention; in 2024, there was a signal of a sharp drop in the admission score line for science law in Inner Mongolia (provincial ranking 6k7–1w2 could be admitted), which may have a lagging psychological impact on physics category applicants; law is an A+ discipline (the only law A+ university nationwide), with top disciplinary strength; physics category enrollment majors include law (finance dual bachelor's degree program), with strong cross-disciplinary appeal; other majors (international business, business administration, social work, journalism) have no A- or above discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Ningxia is very small (about 2.0% in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral regional preference impact on applications; law major popularity was consistently hot from 2021–2023 (recommended), turning to differentiated observation in 2024, but still a popular direction overall; finance/finance/economics categories in 2024 showed differentiated observation, business administration clearly discouraged; the province's total number of candidates in 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 44,500 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, slightly increasing compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2743, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, slight increase in physics category candidates in the province, sustained high application heat from Douyin, and possible lagging impact from the 2024 science admission anomaly, it is expected that the 2026 physics category minimum ranking will slightly shift backward (slightly intensified competition). Predicted minimum ranking approximately 2763, with a range of 2266–3260.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 343 → 150 → 3194 → 398, showing drastic fluctuations. In 2024, there was an abnormal large drop (3194), but in 2025 it quickly stabilized to 398, close to the 2022 level, with a recent baseline ranking of about 398. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans were 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 21 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 22, an increase of 1 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 4.8%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 50–56 range, belonging to the top national political science and law institutions. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (due to early campus safety incidents), but the impact is limited. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 6th (high heat), with high exposure of law-related short videos, maintaining high application attention. In 2024, there was a signal of a sharp drop in the admission line for science law in Inner Mongolia, but the liberal arts/history category was not significantly affected. Law is an A+ discipline (the only law A+ university in the country), with top disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. Other enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism, Applied Psychology, Administrative Management) have no A- or above discipline evaluation data.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity was consistently hot from 2021 to 2023 (recommended), turning to differentiated observation in 2024, but overall remains a popular direction in liberal arts. The total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 66,000 (uncertain), estimated at about 21,400 based on the recent history category proportion of about 32.5%, roughly the same as 2025. China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a provincial university. Its enrollment proportion in Ningxia is very small (about 2.0% in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral regional preference impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 398, the small expansion in 2026 (+1 person) slightly easing competition, high Douyin popularity maintaining application heat, and roughly stable total candidate numbers, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). Predicted minimum ranking is about 399, with a range of 327–471.
